hooks.command: echo '[FeelFlick guardrail] Running bash command. Confirm no .env access, no force-push, no rm -rf on src.'

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreCompact","additionalContext":"FEELFLICK PRODUCT DIRECTION (restore after compact):
- FeelFlick is an emotionally intelligent movie recommendation system. Mood is the entry point. Personalization is the engine.
- Tone: premium, cinematic, modern, human, concise. No AI jargon. No fluffy marketing. No fake stats or social proof.
- Key messages: stop endless scrolling; movies that match your mood; personalized picks for the moment; less scrolling, better choices; built around mood, context, and taste.
- Stack: React 18, Vite, Tailwind, Framer Motion, Supabase (PostgreSQL + pgvector), TMDB, OpenAI embeddings, Vitest.
- Auth: Google OAuth via Supabase. Initialized in main.jsx before React mounts.
- Hard rules: never edit .env, never force-push to main, never delete migrations, never add fake social proof.
- Workflow: lint -> test -> build before every PR."}}'
